subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf of the Divine Unity! With the tongue of thanksgiving must praise and glorification be offered unto Him, for worthy and befitting it is that women [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه حضرت احدیته لسان شکرانه ایله حمد و ستایش لائق و سزاوار که نساء
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
